# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function main: bool ()
  entry:
      STORE true, [a]
      STORE false, [b]
      LOAD t1, [a]
      LOAD t2, [b]
      t3 = AND t1, t2
      STORE t3, [c]
      LOAD t4, [a]
      LOAD t5, [b]
      t6 = OR t4, t5
      STORE t6, [d]
      LOAD t7, [a]
      t8 = NOT t7
      STORE t8, [e]
      LOAD t9, [d]
      RETURN t9
